pom.xml.general_idea: Update Maven compiler source and target properties from Java 8 to Java 21.
Upgrade Spring Boot version to 3.4.1 to align with Java 21 and Spring Framework 6.
Convert the project from a single module to a multi-module parent POM structure.
Remove the Guava dependency which was likely used for utility functions now replaced by standard Java or other libraries.
Remove the Vavr test dependency, likely no longer needed or replaced by standard assertions.
Upgrade AssertJ to version 3.27.3 for better compatibility with modern Java features.
Upgrade JUnit to version 4.13.2 (implied by Spring Boot BOM or explicit update if present, here managed by Spring Boot BOM import).
Upgrade Maven Compiler Plugin to 3.13.0 to support Java 21 compilation.
Upgrade Maven Surefire Plugin to 3.5.2 for better test execution support.
Upgrade Maven Release Plugin to 3.1.1 for modern release management.
Upgrade Jacoco Maven Plugin to 0.8.12 for Java 21 coverage support.
Add Flatten Maven Plugin to manage multi-module POM flattening for OSS releases.
Update groupId and artifactId to reflect the new project structure and naming conventions.
Add SCM, distribution management, and issue management metadata for OSS compliance.

.gitignore.general_idea: Add the Maven Versions Plugin backup file to .gitignore to prevent committing generated version backup files.

.mvn/wrapper/maven-wrapper.properties.general_idea: Upgrade the Maven Wrapper version to 3.3.4 to align with modern Maven tooling standards.
Switch Maven distribution type to 'only-script' to reduce download size and improve wrapper efficiency.
Upgrade the underlying Apache Maven version from 3.5.0 to 3.9.11 to ensure compatibility with Java 21 and modern build features.

mvnw.general_idea: Replace the legacy Maven Wrapper shell script with the modern version 3.3.4 to support newer Maven features and improved cross-platform compatibility.
mvnw.human_impl: diff --git a/mvnw b/mvnw ... # Apache Maven Wrapper startup batch script, version 3.3.4

mvnw.cmd.general_idea: Replace the legacy Maven Wrapper batch script with the modern version 3.3.4 that uses PowerShell for cross-platform compatibility and supports Maven Daemon (mvnd).
mvnw.cmd.human_impl: Replaced entire content of mvnw.cmd with new script starting with '<# : batch portion' and 'Apache Maven Wrapper startup batch script, version 3.3.4'

mvnw.cmd.general_idea: Remove the executable permission bit from the Windows batch file, as it is not required on Windows and often causes confusion in cross-platform repositories.
